name: Maha Shivaratri
traditions: Night-long vigils at Shiva temples; fasting; offering milk, water, and bael leaves to Shiva lingam; chanting Om Namah Shivaya; meditation.
historicalBackground: Maha Shivaratri honors Lord Shiva and is believed to be the night of his cosmic dance (Tandava). Ancient texts describe it as the convergence of Shiva and Shakti.
description: The Great Night of Shiva, a Hindu festival of fasting and devotion honoring Lord Shiva with night-long vigils and temple worship.
